title: neltuma mantaroensis
intro: Neltuma mantaroensis, also known as the Huicho or Neltuma, is a plant species native to the Andes mountain range in South America. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Neltuma mantaroensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
